title: After-Action Report — Live Auction Replay (top-50 stage + montage) and Currency Wiring
scope: IPL-TV-style replay of off-season auction with top 50 lots receiving stage treatment, remaining lots in montage, with currency system integration

rationale.item: User asked for an IPL-TV-style replay experience with animated bidding and dramatic price reveals
Live auction page was rendering prices as $504 instead of ƒ504, bypassing the currency system from PR #33
references: Currency system from PR #33, commit b35b611

delegation_events.decision: Stage tier size set to top 50 lots
delegation_events.quote: Tuned for IPL-TV pacing — 50 × 3.5s ≈ 3 minutes of stage, then ~30 seconds of montage.

delegation_events.decision: Bid sheet depth set to persist top 8 bids per lot
delegation_events.quote: Caps the new table at ~13k rows for a 2500-lot auction; the animation never shows more than ~6 anyway.

delegation_events.decision: Currency must be wired into live page
delegation_events.quote: CAN THIE ACUTION USE THE NE CURRENCY I MADE or not?

actions.description: Added lot_order INTEGER column to auction_results
Added player_overall INTEGER column to auction_results for composite snapshot
Created new auction_lot_bids table to store top 8 bids per lot
Created /auction/live page with Bootstrap two-column layout
Wired currency system into auction page via JavaScript

risk_posture: Currency wiring was implemented second after discovering bypass in first commit
Vickrey-price reconstruction is brittle and duplicates logic from apply_auction
Bid-reveal animation caps at 8 rows even when actual auction had more bidders

validation_claims.claim: Seeded 56-team config with 168 keepers retained, 1736 sold, 2464 lots total
Live feed split correctly: 50 stage / 2414 montage
validation_claims.check_method: Check get_live_auction output on test DB

non_actions.reason: Raised post-facto as a design issue; shipped in follow-up commit
Requires adding n_bidders column but implementation unclear
Currently reconstructed from second_bid; should be pre-computed

residual_risks: Vickrey-price reconstruction formula min_bid=10 will become wrong after auction-magnitude rescale
Skip-to-End recomputes purse rollup instead of using pre-baked field
Stage card shows only 8 bidders capped from bid sheet even when more existed
open_hooks: Rescale auction to guilder-era magnitudes with higher starting purses and min-bid floor
Add price column to auction_results to eliminate reconstruction logic
Surface true bidder count in stage card ('8 of 14 bidders shown')
Add end-screen narrative reels (biggest splurges, steals, biggest underbids, overpay teams)
Integrate auction coverage into team pages and league front page
Allow replaying past seasons via /auction/live?season=N query param
section_headers_original: After-Action Report — Live Auction Replay (top-50 stage + montage) and Currency Wiring
parser_notes: Complete AAR with clear scoping, design decisions, and follow-up tracking. Currency wiring issue discovered mid-build and fixed in second commit.
